title: Migrate and safely reclaim historical storage residue
goal: After prevention is live, classify historical RepoBrief artifacts, worktrees, build outputs, caches and Docker residue, preserve required evidence and recover only exact verified safe candidates.

approval.note: Only exact candidates proven safe by the completed prevention mechanisms may be reclaimed. No generic recursive deletion is authorized.

acceptance.assertion: Every candidate is classified with owner, active dependency, pin and cleanup strategy.
No dirty worktree, active task, process, foreign lease, Docker volume or unverified evidence payload is removed.
Worktree removal uses recovery refs, archive manifests and hash-bound cleanup plans.
Recovered bytes and retained blockers are reported by producer with readback.

metadata.source: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1 plan from live 2026-07-14 storage audit
does_not_establish: permission to bypass leases or dirty-state guards
